data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a seamless handoff between virtual and in-person modes. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the system supports this seamless transition, as it only describes a scenario where the virtual portion runs long and the in-person start time adjusts automatically. This indicates a potential gap in the implementation of the requirement, as there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the handoff is indeed seamless and functional as required.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system provides a seamless handoff between virtual and in-person modes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
